name: crore budget → correct rupee mapping, show matching property
rule: Reply should present the Baner properties priced within or near ₹1 crore (₹1,00,00,000). The 3BHK at ₹95L (9500000) and 2BHK at ₹79L (7900000) both qualify. Must NOT say "nothing available" or quote a wrong price. Should present at least one option.
raw:
Hi Amit! Welcome to SK Properties 😊

With a 1 crore budget in Baner, I can show you some excellent options. Let me share a couple of properties that fit your budget:

🏡 *3BHK Skyline Residency*
📍 Baner
🛏️ 3BHK · 📐 1450 sqft · 💰 ₹95L
🗓️ Ready to move
✨ Gym · Pool · East-facing · Clubhouse · Premium society, 2 covered parking

🏡 *2BHK Sunrise Park*
📍 Baner
🛏️ 2BHK · 📐 1080 sqft · 💰 ₹79L
🗓️ Ready to move
✨ Gym · Clubhouse · East-facing · Vastu-friendly layout

Would you like more details about either of these properties, or would you prefer to see them in person?
